title: Wedelia bishoplecta
taxonomy: Wedelia bishoplecta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Wedelia, which consists of various species of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The genus Wedelia is further classified under the subfamily Heliantoideae and the family Asteraceae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships with other plants in the daisy family. intro: Wedelia bishopiana, also known as Wedelia, is a flowering plant species native to Central America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and medicinal properties.
